overview: EduTrack is a full-stack Tuition Management System with role-based access for students, teachers, and admins. It covers course management, attendance tracking, fee management, file uploads for study materials, performance tracking, and an analytics dashboard — all in a modern, responsive UI.
features: Role-based access: student, teacher, admin panels
Student: view courses, fees, attendance, and study materials
Teacher: manage attendance, upload materials, track performance, schedule classes
Admin: manage users, courses, batches, fee tracking (paid/unpaid)
Analytics dashboard with enrollment, fee, and attendance charts
File uploads for study materials and assignments
